heading: Sense of Senate that lobbying expenses should remain nondeductible
label: 1612 Sense of Senate that lobbying expenses should remain nondeductible
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1996section 24 of Pub. L. 104–65section 1601 of this title

children.heading: Findings
children.label: a Findings
children.text: The Senate finds that ordinary Americans generally are not allowed to deduct the costs of communicating with their elected representatives.

children.heading: Sense of Senate
children.label: b Sense of Senate
children.text: It is the sense of the Senate that lobbying expenses should not be tax deductible.
